title: EVA FEEDS PAPA ICE CREAM
prompt: Tight close-up in @costco-food-court. @Eva on the LEFT lifts a strawberry-vanilla ice cream cone toward @Papa on the RIGHT, who has his eyes closed and mouth open like a baby bird. Eva grins HUGE, tip of tongue poking out in concentration. Eva (giggling): "OPEN bigger, Papa!" Papa (mumbled, mouth still open): "Mmmf." Eva (touching ice cream to his mouth): "Did you LIKE it?" Papa (eyes open, dramatic chef's kiss): "Mwah. PERFECT."
